network_error: Network connection failed. Please check your connection.
permission_denied: You do not have permission to perform this action.
server_error: System server error. Please try again later.
general_error: An error occurred. Please try again.

api_errors.validation_failed: Please check the information you entered and try again.
api_errors.auth_invalid_credentials: The email or password you entered is incorrect.
api_errors.auth_session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

api_errors.request_throttled: You are doing this too quickly. Please wait a moment and try again.
api_errors.request_already_processed: This request has already been processed.
api_errors.request_conflict: This information already exists in the system.
api_errors.request_invalid_state: This action cannot be completed right now.
api_errors.request_bad_request: The request could not be completed. Please review your information and try again.
api_errors.request_unknown: The request could not be completed at this time.
api_errors.server_error: The system is temporarily busy. Please try again later.
api_errors.category_has_subcategories: Cannot delete category because it has subcategories.

api_errors.user_cannot_delete_own_account: You cannot delete your own account.
api_errors.booking_already_paid: This booking has already been paid.
api_errors.booking_already_cancelled_or_completed: This booking has already been cancelled or completed.
